svg.title: ParsVoice pipeline overview
svg.desc: Two-row pipeline: Audiobooks → VAD boundary → Transcription → Sentence check → Boundary opt. → Quality filter → Speaker ID → Punctuation → ParsVoice corpus.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the audiobook source for ParsVoice')
sendPrompt('How does VAD boundary detection work in ParsVoice?')
sendPrompt('How is audio transcribed in ParsVoice?')
sendPrompt('How does sentence completion check work in ParsVoice?')
sendPrompt('How does boundary optimisation work in ParsVoice?')
sendPrompt('How does quality filtering work in ParsVoice?')
sendPrompt('How does speaker identification work in ParsVoice?')
sendPrompt('How does punctuation restoration work in ParsVoice?')
sendPrompt('What are the final statistics of the ParsVoice corpus?')
